results.title: Pei-Si Lai to take on role of GXS Bank Group CEO
results.description: May 14, 2025 -PETALING JAYA, 14 May 2025 – GXBank, the digital bank subsidiary of GXS Bank in Malaysia, today announced the succession in its senior management team. Effective June 1, 2025,Pei-Si Lai, the current Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of GXBank, will take on the role of GXS Bank Group CEO, following ...

results.title: GXS Bank CEO Muthukrishnan Ramaswami to retire
results.description: May 14, 2025 -GXS Bank's board has already announced its leadership transition plans, confirmingPei-Si Lai, current CEO of GXBank, as Ramaswami's successor, effective 1 June 2025.

results.title: GXS Bank Group CEO Muthukrishnan Ramaswami to retire
results.description: He will continue to serve as a Senior Advisor to the GXS Group. GXS Bank’s Board of Directors have appointedMs Pei-Si Lai, CEO of GXBank (the Malaysia subsidiary of GXS Bank), to succeed Mr Ramaswami. Ms Lai will step down as CEO of GXBank, and take up the role of GXS Bank Group CEO.
